name: Real-Time Fire Detection & Extinguishing System
desc: Built a real-time detection system for fire, smoke, and flame from webcam feeds using YOLOv5 and OpenCV; achieved mAP of 0.456 and 60%+ precision on a custom Roboflow dataset.

name: Harmful Brain Activity Classification
desc: Classified six types of harmful brain activity using EEG data from 17,300 patients; reduced features from 224 to 52 using PCA while maintaining 94%+ accuracy and reached 95% accuracy with Random Forest.

name: Progressive Reading Aid for Visually Impaired
desc: Created a real-time reading aid using object detection on Raspberry Pi to assist visually impaired users in reading and navigating their environment.

name: Hybrid Encryption Algorithm
desc: Research work on secure key generation and effective hybrid encryption for communication security.

name: Blockchain Healthcare System
desc: Healthcare project focused on secure distributed record handling and trustable access control.
